response: the sacred verses of siriaragoo mahala 3 speak to the spirit of devotion and the importance of following the path of the guru - the true path leads to the divine through the grace of the guru - the soul must merge with its true self to become pure - the holy name of harik is the source of all truth and the path to enlightenment - gene and language are reflections of the divine in human form - the visit to the guru is a journey of the spirit toward truth and light - the language of the soul is the sacred word that guides the way - the spirit must seek the guru to find the way to salvation - the visit to the guru is the key to the spirit's liberation - the language of the guru is the path to the spirit's awakening - the gene of devotion is passed through generations - the spirit must be free from attachments to find the true path - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey to the divine - the language of the heart is the true language of the spirit - the gene of faith is the foundation of the spirit's journey - the visit to the guru is the way to the spirit's liberation - the language of the guru is the key to the spirit's awakening - the spirit must be united with the guru to find the path to truth - the visit to the guru is the way to the spirit's salvation - the language of the soul is the sacred word that guides the way - the gene of devotion is the source of the spirit's strength - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey to the divine - the language of the heart is the true language of the spirit - the spirit must seek the guru to find the way to salvation -
